stories.h: OpenAI and Jony Ive unveil "io", a screenless AI companion device
stories.s: The first serious post-smartphone bet from the post-smartphone era's biggest lab.
b: Pocket device with camera, mics, and no display; ships early 2027.
Positioned as an ambient companion, not a phone replacement.

stories.s: A new top-tier model class aimed squarely at week-long autonomous work.
b: Flagship targets multi-day agentic tasks with large reliability gains.
Enterprise agent deployments cited as the core use case.

stories.h: EU finalizes AI Act codes of practice after months of lobbying
stories.s: The rulebook labs will actually be graded on — enforcement follows within weeks.
b: Final text softened transparency demands but kept safety-testing teeth.
Sets the template other regulators are copying.

stories.h: Nvidia becomes the first $5 trillion company
stories.s: The entire AI boom, priced into one balance sheet.
b: Data-center revenue up 70% year over year.
Now worth more than the next four chipmakers combined.

stories.h: Waymo and Tesla robotaxis go head-to-head in Austin
stories.s: Two philosophies of autonomy — lidar caution vs camera scale — finally share the same streets.
b: Tesla's launch is invite-only with safety monitors; Waymo runs fully driverless.
Early incident data became an instant political football.

stories.h: DeepMind's cell-simulation model predicts drug responses in silico
stories.s: AlphaFold's successor moves from protein shapes to whole living systems.
b: Simulates how cell types respond to compounds before lab testing.
Pharma partners report cutting early-stage screening time in half.

stories.h: Meta dangles $100M packages to poach top AI researchers
stories.s: Talent, not compute, is now the scarcest resource in the race.
b: Several high-profile departures from OpenAI and DeepMind confirmed.
Sets a new market rate for frontier research talent.

stories.h: First AI-discovered drug clears Phase II trials
stories.s: The proof point AI-for-biology investors have waited a decade for.
b: Fibrosis drug designed end-to-end by Insilico's platform.
Phase III begins later this year.

stories.h: xAI's Colossus 2 comes online with 1M GPUs
stories.s: The largest training cluster ever built — and a preview of the power-grid politics ahead.
b: Memphis site now draws power comparable to a small city.
Local utility disputes are becoming the template fight for AI infrastructure.

stories.h: AI startups raise a record $28B in Q2
stories.s: No slowdown — but the money is concentrating in fewer, bigger bets.
b: Top 10 rounds took 60% of all dollars.
Application-layer share grew for the third straight quarter.
